title: Psychiatric Case Management * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Psychiatric Case Management * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health consultations, evaluations, treatment, and case management for seniors in care facilities and referred from private medical practitioners. Enhanced care outreach services include intensive case management, counseling, and behavioral interventions. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults 65 and older and people under age 65 who are homebound due to a physical disability or persistent mental illness. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Some services available evenings and weekends by arrangement. Email (541) 322-7500 9 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH
